title: senecio peninsularis
intro: Senecio peninsularis, also known as the Peninsula Groundsel or Senecio, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio peninsularis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion, while also serving as a natural remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
